description: Stage 2 frontend reconciler. The flow scans L4/L5, creates frontend .defs.ts files for L5 todoFrontend=create work, materializes stale L2 runtime files, registers pages, and finalizes L5 owner status. L4 remains read-only. config.json is composed at publish time by nodejsSaveConfigJson.ts.

specFirst.policy: This flow.json is the contract. Future structural changes must update this file before code.
specFirst.modernizationCheckpoint: 2026-07-13 removed phantom V01 and aspirational step declarations, extracted prompts, and moved step agents into steps/* folders. The steps below describe the currently implemented flow.
deferred: Unify Studio and CLI materialization repair policy in cfeMaterializeCore.

slashCommands.@@changeFrontend /run: Scan L4/L5 and materialize stale or missing L2 runtime files without resetting done owners.
slashCommands.@@changeFrontend /rebuild all: Reset done owners to toCreate, regenerate .defs.ts and materialize stale or missing runtime files.
slashCommands.@@changeFrontend /rebuild defs: Reset done owners to toCreate and regenerate only .defs.ts. Do not materialize runtime files.

entry.noInputPolicy: The agent receives no module, owner, page or device arguments. It discovers actionable work from L5 todoFrontend and existing L2 pipeline files.

folderLayout.helpersFolder: helpers/ contains shared/policy-frozen modules used across steps and CLIs: cfeCreateShared, cfeL4Contract, cfeMaterializeCore, cfeMaterializeStudio and nodejsMaterializeLlmClient.
folderLayout.currentBoundary: Step documentation, prompts, and step-owned TypeScript agents live under steps/. Shared helpers live under helpers/. Skills, uxTemplates, CLI entrypoints and the public root agent remain in l2/agentChangeFrontend.

writes: status on processed l5 todoFrontend owners
engineInvariants: parallel_dynamic fan-out parents use maxParallel 5 unless this file declares otherwise.
Fan-out progress titles must expose completed, total and failed counters.
Dynamic child args stay compact and unique.
A worker should prefer completed-with-trace plus downstream verification when one item can be repaired without failing the whole pipeline.
PlanIds must be unique; runtime-generated planIds are documented by pattern below.

steps.goal: Parse slash command, reset status when requested, and enqueue either help or scan-create-l4.
Read create context, decide whether page creation and/or materialization are required, and enqueue the next concrete steps.
steps.noWorkBehavior: If no pages are pending and materialize=false, complete with no further steps.

steps.goal: For one page, save contract defs deterministically, request semantic page layout from the LLM, then save variants/shared state through deterministic reconciliation.
Plan stale or missing materialization work from generated .defs.ts pipelines and enqueue ordered phase barriers.
Start one phase fan-out and schedule a verify step for that phase.
Generate one materialized runtime file from one pipeline item.
Verify generated outputs and run bounded repair rounds when needed.
Write page preview HTML, register generated pages, and sign l5/project.json.
Validate create/register markers and mark processed L5 todoFrontend owners as done.

removedLegacy.reason: Console-only V01 prototype was not reached by the current flow and conflicted with the create-v1 implementation in future LLM context.
Local materialize config can contain API tokens and must be ignored. The CLI now reads shared LLM settings from mls-base/.env.
